mapper.select: SELECT id, brand, model, interface_type, cores, threads, base_frequency, max_frequency, tdp, integrated_graphics, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM cpu_info

SELECT id, brand, model, interface_type, cores, threads, base_frequency, max_frequency, tdp, integrated_graphics, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM cpu_info WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%') OR LOWER(model) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%')
SELECT id, brand, model, memory_size, memory_type, memory_bus_width, base_clock, boost_clock, tdp, interface_type, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM gpu_info

SELECT id, brand, model, memory_size, memory_type, memory_bus_width, base_clock, boost_clock, tdp, interface_type, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM gpu_info WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%') OR LOWER(model) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%')
SELECT id, brand, model, chipset, cpu_interface, memory_slots, max_memory, memory_type, power_phase, sata_ports, m2_slots, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM motherboard_info

SELECT id, brand, model, chipset, cpu_interface, memory_slots, max_memory, memory_type, power_phase, sata_ports, m2_slots, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM motherboard_info WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%') OR LOWER(model) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%')
mapper.update:
UPDATE gpu_info
brand = #{brand}, model = #{model},
memory_size = #{memorySize}, memory_type = #{memoryType}, memory_bus_width = #{memoryBusWidth}, base_clock = #{baseClock}, boost_clock = #{boostClock}, tdp = #{tdp},
interface_type = #{interfaceType}, release_date = #{releaseDate},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE motherboard_info
brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, chipset = #{chipset}, cpu_interface = #{cpuInterface}, memory_slots = #{memorySlots}, max_memory = #{maxMemory}, memory_type = #{memoryType}, power_phase = #{powerPhase}, sata_ports = #{sataPorts}, m2_slots = #{m2Slots}, release_date = #{releaseDate},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
